headline: Zebra (ZBRA) Could Find a Support Soon, Here's Why You Should Buy the Stock Now
summary: Zebra (ZBRA) witnesses a hammer chart pattern, indicating support found by the stock after losing some value lately. This coupled with an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean a trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
